ns1:revision.ns1:text:
== Description == OST Pool Quotas feature gives an ability to limit user's(group's/project's) disk usage at OST pool.
Each Quota Pool(QP) duplicates content of OST pool. Thus QP could be tuned with standard lctl pool_new/add/remove/erase commands. All QPs are subset of a ''global pool'' that includes all OSTs and MDTs(DOM case).
See more details in [http://wiki.lustre.org/OST_Pool_Quotas_HLD#Use_Cases OST Pool Quotas HLD].
== DOM and MDT pools == From Quota Master point of view "data" MDTs are regular members together with OSTs. But until we haven't a mechanism to group MDTs in pools, '''Quota Pools support only OSTs'''.
== New options at lfs quota/setquota == 2 new options were introduced to support QP at lfs quota and setquota: * ''--pool "pool_name"'' is new option to be used with lfs setquota to set quota for user/qroup/project per quota pool. *:Example: lfs setquota -u quota_usr --pool "qpool1" -B10M /mnt/lustre * ''--pool "pool_name"'' is an option to show quota for user/group/project per quota pool. *:Example: lfs quota -u quota_usr --pool "qpool1" /mnt/lustre == How To setup QP == === Hard limit example === Let's imagine you haven't any OST pool(if you want to setup already existed pool, go to 3): # lctl pool_new qpool1 /mnt/lustre # lctl pool_add qpool1 OST000 /mnt/lustre # lfs setquota -u quota_usr -B100T /mnt/lustre /* it is a limit for global pool. QPs don't work properly without that */ # lfs setquota -u quota_usr --pool "qpool1" -B100M /mnt/lustre Note, you need to setup wide-system hard limit before setting QP limit. If you don't need to limit user at all OSTs and MDTs at system, only per pool, I would recommend to set some unrealistic big hard limit. Without that OSTs don't know that quota for quota_usr is enabled.
=== Soft limit example === # lctl pool_new qpool1 /mnt/lustre # lctl pool_add qpool1 OST000 /mnt/lustre # lfs setquota -u quota_usr -B100T /mnt/lustre /* notify OSTs that to enforce quota for quota_usr */ # lfs setquota -t -u --block-grace 30 --pool qpool1 /mnt/lustre /* set block grace 30 s for all users at qpool1 */ # lfs setquota -u quota_usr -b10M --pool qpool1 /mnt/lustre /* soft limit 10M for quota_usr */ # /runas -u quota_usr dd if=/dev/urandom of=/mnt/lustre/dir/f1 bs=1M count=15 # [root@dhcppc3 tests]# lfs quota -u quota_usr --pool qpool1 /mnt/lustre Disk quotas for usr quota_usr (uid 60000): Filesystem kbytes quota limit grace files quota limit grace /mnt/lustre 14336* 10240 107374182400 26s 1 0 0 - == Links == === Docs === [[OST Pool Quotas HLD]]
[[OST Pool Quota Test Plan]]
[[OST Pool Quotas Test Report]]
[http://cdn.opensfs.org/wp-content/uploads/2019/07/LUG2019-Introducing_Pool_Quotas-Spitz.pdf Introducing Pool Quotas]
